mano_cua.result_summary: Globe投影模式下setStyle()增量更新存在明确bug: _updateDiff函数在map.ts:2177读取undefined对象的type属性，抛出TypeError。系统降级为全量样式重建(Rebuilding from scratch)，增量更新失效。控制台报错: Unable to perform style diff: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'type')。Globe投影在样式切换后保持不变（通过降级路径），但样式视觉切换未完全生效。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Globe projection style diff incremental update has confirmed bug at map.ts:2177 _updateDiff function. TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'type'). System falls back to rebuilding style from scratch instead of incremental diff update.
